title: Package Manager & Analytics Update
desc: Migrated to pnpm, added web analytics, and upgraded jsrepo to v3
content:
What's New

📦 npm → pnpm Migration

Switched from npm to pnpm for faster installs and better disk space efficiency.

📊 Web Analytics

Added web analytics using One Dollar Stats for lightweight, privacy-friendly tracking.

🚀 jsrepo v2 → v3

Upgraded to jsrepo v3 for improved MCP server integration and better component registry support.

Visit the MCP Docs for updated integration instructions.

title: 60 New Veil Components
desc: Added a full Veil collection with 60 production-ready components
content:
We launched the new Veil collection with 60 production-ready components designed for modern Svelte sites.

  • Hero (5)
  • Header (4)
  • Features (3)
  • Content (3)
  • Integration (2)
  • Call To Action (4)
  • Stats (4)
  • Pricing (3)
  • Testimonial (4)
  • Team (2)
  • Logo Cloud (2)
  • FAQs (4)
  • Contact (2)
  • Signup (3)
  • Login (3)
  • Forgot Password (3)
  • Comparator (3)
  • Footer (6)

Explore the full Veil collection on the Veil page.
